title: achyranthes frutescens
intro: Achyranthes frutescens, also known as Chinese bugbane, is a perennial herb native to East Asia, characterized by its tall stem and white or purple flowers. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Achyranthes frutescens include reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving cardiovascular health, among others. Achyranthes frutescens can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
